changeSet.author: mherman22
changeSet.comment: Increase inventory lot quantities for bulk sample processing
changeSet.sql: -- Update all reagent lots to have 10000 units for demo/testing UPDATE clinlims.inventory_lot SET initial_quantity = 10000, current_quantity = 10000 WHERE lot_number IN ( 'EK-2024-001', -- DNA Extraction Kit 'RPB-2024-002', -- RNA Preservation Buffer 'PM-2024-003', -- PCR Master Mix 'MRK-2024-004', -- Malaria RDT Buffer 'CLB-2024-005', -- Cell Lysis Buffer 'PK-2024-006', -- Proteinase K Solution 'ETH-2024-007', -- Ethanol 'NFW-2024-008' -- Nuclease-Free Water );
